title: Notification issued in exercise of the powers conferred under part VII, VIII and IX of the Bihar Reorganisation Act, 2000

Whereas section 63 of the Act provides that the arrangement in regard to supply of water for any area shall not be modified to the disadvantage of any area by reason of the fact that it is, by virtue of the provision of Part II of the Act, outside the State in which the catchment area, reservoirs and other works for supply of water, as the case may be, are located. Therefore, till the Ganga and Sone Management Board is constituted and starts functioning or any other suitable arrangement is made, it has become necessary to maintain the present arrangements for the administration, maintenance and operation of head works ( dams, barrages, regulators) and part of canal network necessary to supply water to the successor States. These orders are, therefore, issued in the interest of continuance of existing arrangements in regard to supply of water to the successor States of Bihar and Jharkhand. 1) It is, hereby, ordered , that the Water Resources projects being managed by the existing State of Bihar (As per Annexure - I ) falling in geographical area of the successor State of Jharkhand by virtue of the provision of Part II of the Act, shall continue to be looked after as per existing arrangement without any disadvantage to any area of the successor State of Bihar. -- 2 of 4 -- \ t 2) If any difficulty arises in giving effect to the provisions of this Notification, the Central Government may, after consultation with the Government of each successor State, wherever necessary, give such directions as it deems proper to the State Government or other authority concerned, for the administration, maintenance and operation of the previous arrangement immediately before the appointed day, These orders shall commence from the appointed day. [File No. 10-18/2000-MT) P. C. MATHUR, Commissioner (PR) , Annexure-I Name of Scheme Basin. 1. 0 J. 4. 5. 6. 7, NORTH KOEL RESERVOIR PROJECT BATANE RESERVOIR PROJECT TCLAYA DHADHAR DIVERSION SCHEME BARNAR RESERVOIR PROJECT UPPER SAKRI RESERVOIR PROJECT CHANDAN RESERVOIR PROJECT SITNDER RESERVOIR PROJECT NORTH KOEL PUNPUN KIUL HAROHAR KIUL-HAROHAR KIUL-HAROHAR BILASI, CHANDAN, CMIR BILASI, CHANDAN,CHIR Printed by the Manager, OovL of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, Now Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhl-110054. -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
